title: DepKeeper - Python Dependency Manager
description: A smart CLI tool for managing Python dependencies in requirements.txt files — detects outdated packages, respects semantic versioning boundaries, resolves conflicts, and runs async PyPI queries for fast results.

title: Hollow Knight Analyzer
description: A Streamlit-based web app for Hollow Knight players to analyze save files - decrypts .dat saves, tracks 112% completion, visualizes progress with interactive maps, charm optimizer, and exportable reports.
